officers.name: Brandon Beveridge
officers.title: President
officers.bio: Brandon has been with the Satyrs since joining as a member and has served in various leadership roles.

officers.name: Brent Sweer
officers.title: Vice President
officers.bio: Brent is passionate about motorcycle culture and community building.

officers.name: Jovani Martinez
officers.title: Road Captain
officers.bio: Jovani leads our rides and ensures everyone has a safe and memorable experience on the road.

officers.name: Ron Neiport
officers.title: Treasurer
officers.bio: Ron manages the club's finances and helps coordinate fundraising efforts.

officers.name: Terry Pederson
officers.title: Correspondence Secretary
officers.bio: Terry handles club communications and outreach to the broader community.

officers.name: Tom "Hank" Rhodes
officers.title: Recording Secretary
officers.bio: Hank keeps detailed records of club meetings and important decisions.

members.name: John Currier
members.bio: John is an active member who participates in many of our rides and events.

members.name: Stephen Ely
members.bio: Stephen brings enthusiasm and dedication to every club activity.

members.name: Donald Cranford
members.bio: Donald is a valued member of the Satyrs community.
